tasks.title: Create links table + openDb/migrate
tasks.dod: openDb(':memory:') creates links(code,url,created_at,clicks) with no separate migrate call; a fresh clone with no data/ directory opens successfully

tasks.title: Domain: generateCode, createLink, resolveLink, listLinks, getStats
tasks.dod: createLink returns a 7-char base62 code and regenerates on collision; resolveLink increments clicks and returns null on a miss; no express import

tasks.title: App routes: POST /api/shorten, GET /:code, /api/links, /api/stats/:code
tasks.dod: routes return the documented status codes; every /api/* route is declared above the catch-all /:code; a malformed JSON body stays a 400, not a 500

tasks.title: Frontend: form + result + links table
tasks.dod: the page renders, the form submits a url and shows the short handle, and existing links appear in the list with their click counts; no framework, no dependency

tasks.title: Seed test suite: unit + integration + e2e smoke (AC-01..05)
tasks.dod: npm run test:fast green (unit + integration over :memory:) and npm run test:e2e green (one browser path against its own file DB); no test touches the network
